extraction.one_line_summary: GALLOPIN Tony attacked from the breakaway with 2km remaining on rolling terrain and soloed to victory with 30 seconds margin.
tactical_patterns: GALLOPIN attacked with 2km on false-flat approach, gambling the chasing breakaway wouldn't organize effectively behind.
MOVISTAR pushed peloton aggressively into late narrow technical section to protect VALVERDE's points jersey despite no GC threat.
Narrow road pinch point caused major split, proving pre-stage positioning crucial even on 2.5% gradient profile.

rider_signals.GALLOPIN Tony: positive: maintained 30-second winning gap from 2km solo move, showing recovery ability after injury-plagued early season
rider_signals.KWIATKOWSKI Michał: negative: crashed in narrow technical section despite holding green jersey, exposing vulnerability in positioning
rider_signals.VALVERDE Alejandro: neutral: fought hard to stay front for points sprint despite already leading classification
rider_signals.BUCHMANN Emanuel: neutral: positioned well at front when peloton split occurred in narrow section
